runner: hive; 5 tuxedo DFR, routetest build (demo-Event gated off, MASK+SENDTO persisted to NVS), via ssh tuxedo serial capture
topology: chain A-R1-R2-D + alternate A-X (X-D link absent), imposed via per-board MASK on full-mesh ESP-NOW

expectations.observed: AFTER FIX: directed_via next_hop=R2, RT-DBG REPLY sender=R2, path_confidence to D via R2 climbed 0.66->0.96 — CONVERGED (was flooding pre-fix)

A is the ORIGIN — emits requests route:None via direct broadcast BY DESIGN (does not use the trail for its own first hop); not a directed-trail convergence target. Reply reaches A end-to-end (R1 directs the reply to A).
X never selected as a directed next_hop (alt path with X-D absent does not steal the trail)

notes: RESOLVED — the §4.3.4 reply-confirmed distributed trail is ADEQUATE on real ESP-NOW; no spec/canon change. The original run (bl200-metal-0622-cleanrun) showed a real SIM-vs-METAL DIVERGENCE: directed_via converged ONLY on the hop adjacent to dest (R2->D); upstream (R1->R2) stayed flooding. Routed SPEC-FIRST to specs+core. ROOT CAUSE (metal-pinpointed via instrumented RT-DBG of the 3 decisive bits contains/sender/path-conf): a one-line FIRMWARE bug, NOT a spec gap, NOT CAP (CAP=256>>~28 sends), NOT broadcast-overhearing (topology MASK isolates; core's sim was silent/converged in every config). The reply REUSED the request's msg_id and dedup keys on (msg_id as u16); so at every relay the reply collided with the request that node had already forwarded -> DROP Duplicate -> the reply died at the hop ADJACENT to dest (which still reinforced because on_received runs BEFORE the dedup check) and NEVER propagated upstream = the exact 'adjacent-converges, upstream-floods' signature. FIX = distinct reply msg_id (h.msg_id | 0x8000; the distinguishing bit must be in the LOW 16 because dedup truncates to u16 — a first attempt with 0x8000_0000 still dropped, caught on metal). Request id stays in the reply_marker payload for correlation. POST-FIX VERIFIED on the isolated 5-DFR (NVS-persisted MASK+SENDTO defeat the capture DTR-reset): R1->R2 directed_via, path_confidence 0.66->0.96 (was flooding); R2->D 0.984; D exactly_once. The metal tier found + pinpointed + fixed a real implementation bug the sim could not surface (the harness models neither u16-dedup truncation nor on_received-before-dedup ordering). Commit bdc4d3b.
